Attempting to inline `v` on with pointer receiver method calling.

Regression test for issue #75200.

-- go.mod --
module example.com/a
go 1.18

-- c/c.go --
package c

import "fmt"

type V int

func (V) Method() { }

func _() {
    var v V = V(123)
    v = V(13)
    v.Method() //@codeaction("v", "refactor.inline.variable", result=inlineV)
    fmt.Println(v)
}

-- @inlineV/c/c.go --
package c

import "fmt"

type V int

func (V) Method() { }

func _() {
    var v V = V(123)
    v = V(13)
    V(123).Method() //@codeaction("v", "refactor.inline.variable", result=inlineV)
    fmt.Println(v)
}
